name: Personal Information Protection and Electronic Documents Act
owner: Office of the Privacy Commissioner of Canada
description: Canada's Personal Information Protection and Electronic Documents Act — federal private-sector privacy law. Replacement law (Bill C-27 CPPA) was proposed but did not pass before 2025 election.
relationToCloudSecurity: Applies to cloud-hosted systems within scope.
relationToAISecurity: Applies to AI systems within scope.
